creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Which version of the DRM kernel package are you using (`pkg info 'drm*kmod'`)?  Please try and report what happens when changing versions (currently, 5.10, 5.15 and 6.1 are available).

Also, if you have the opportunity, please try a not too old 14-STABLE and report.

Thanks.
